mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_notification ( user_id, type, title, content, related_order_id, related_path, is_read, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{relatedOrderId}, #{relatedPath}, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, type, title, content, related_order_id, related_path, is_read, created_at, read_at FROM user_notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY is_read ASC, created_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE user_notification SET is_read = 1, read_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
